error.heic-not-supported: HEIC and HEIF images are not directly supported. Please export as JPEG before upload — the iOS share sheet does this automatically in most apps.
error.size-too-large: File too large ({{sizeMb}} MB). Maximum: {{limitMb}} MB.
error.pdf-page-limit: PDF too long ({{actualPages}} pages). Maximum: {{limitPages}} pages. Please split the document before upload.
error.image-dimension-limit: Image too large ({{width}}×{{height}} px). Maximum: {{limitPx}} px per edge.
error.pdf-unreadable: PDF could not be read. It may be damaged or encrypted.
error.generic: File could not be processed. Please try again.

pdf-rasterization.title: PDF will be uploaded as images
pdf-rasterization.explanation: This PDF has no extractable text. Phylax must send the pages as images to the AI provider so the content can be classified.
pdf-rasterization.consequence: The image data leaves your device and is processed by the AI provider.
pdf-rasterization.remember-checkbox: Remember for this session (until next browser restart)
